title: Warden Slayer Enchantment
description: A simple enchantment to fight the strongest minecraft mob
body:
## Overview
Warden Slayer is an enchantment that you can put on a sword, max level V.

It increases the damage dealt to a warden by 50 * enchantment level.

## Features
- It can be obtained only in the enchanting table.
- It can be crafted using a book and some echo shards.
- In-game description of the enchantment if used alongside Enchantment Descriptions.
- If you want the enchantment to be obtainable through villagers trades as well, you can do that through datapack by adding "wardenslayer:warden_slayer" to this file: data -> minecraft -> tags -> enchantment -> tradeable.json.

## Feedback
This mod also exists on curseforge, for any problem, leave a comment on the [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wardenslayerenchantment).
